name: construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, delays in permit submissions cause project hold-ups. We automate permit submissions instead of manual tracking and submission of permits.
problem_solved: Timely submission of required permits for construction projects.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Timely submission of required permits for construction projects.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, delays in permit submissions cause project hold-ups. We automate permit submissions instead of manual tracking and submission of permits.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and submission of permits

one_liner: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, delays in permit submissions cause project hold-ups. We automate permit submissions instead of manual tracking and submission of permits.
